query_title: The Fresh Prince of Bel-Air Reunion

recommendations.title: Anthony Jeselnik: Fire in the Maternity Ward
recommendations.overview: Forging his own comedic boundaries, Anthony Jeselnik revels in getting away with saying things others can't in this stand-up special shot in New York.

recommendations.title: Taylor Tomlinson: Quarter-Life Crisis
recommendations.overview: Comedian Taylor Tomlinson is halfway through her 20s — and she's over it. From dating losers to a failed engagement, she takes aim at her life choices.

recommendations.title: Friday After Next
recommendations.overview: Craig and his cousin Day-Day have finally moved out of their parents' houses and into their own crib, working nights at a local mall as security guards. When their house is robbed on Christmas Eve they set out to track down the culprit.

recommendations.title: Searching for Sugar Man
recommendations.overview: Two South Africans set out to discover what happened to their unlikely musical hero, the mysterious 1970s rock 'n' roller, Rodriguez.

recommendations.title: BTS World Tour: Love Yourself - Japan Edition
recommendations.overview: BTS perform their Japan concert at Tokyo Dome and Fukuoka Yahuoku Dome during their Love Yourself World Tour.

recommendations.title: Avicii: True Stories
recommendations.overview: Documentary about the arena-packing Swedish DJ, chronicling his explosive rise to fame and surprising decision to retire from live performances in 2016.

recommendations.title: Baraka
recommendations.overview: A paralysingly beautiful documentary with a global vision—an odyssey through landscape and time—that attempts to capture the essence of life.

recommendations.title: The Social Dilemma
recommendations.overview: This documentary-drama hybrid explores the dangerous human impact of social networking, with tech experts sounding the alarm on their own creations.

recommendations.title: Teen Titans: Trouble in Tokyo
recommendations.genres: Animation, Action, Science Fiction, TV Movie
recommendations.overview: After a battle with a high-tech villain named, Saiko-Tek, the Teen Titans travel to the city of Tokyo where they find themselves embroiled in a conflict with an ancient enemy.
recommendations.director: Matt Youngberg, Michael Chang, Heather A. Maxwell

recommendations.title: The Greatest Night in Pop
recommendations.overview: On a January night in 1985, music's biggest stars gathered to record "We Are the World." This documentary goes behind the scenes of the historic event.
